changelog: First Comlink command now reliably reaches the WCB.** Fixed a race condition
where the first Comlink command after a cold connection would silently fail —
the booster reported success but the bytes were dropped before reaching the
device. The previous workaround of opening the WCB tab in DroidNet first is no
Comlink history view recovers from corruption automatically.** A torn write
could previously leave the history file unparseable, causing the history view
to error every poll and crashing the Comlink service thread on the next
command. The view now self-heals: corrupt files are preserved as
`.corrupt.<timestamp>` for diagnosis and a fresh history starts immediately.
Maintenance release: fixes a problem that could stop software updates from installing.

Updates no longer fail during the 'Creating backup' step. On some devices, installing an update stopped with an error while backing up the current installation, leaving the booster on its existing version. Updates now complete reliably, and fresh-install images no longer include the leftover developer file that caused it.

Already stuck on this error? Open the Emergency Console at http://YOUR-BOOSTER-ADDRESS/console and run: cd /opt/droidnet/web && rm -rf standalone && echo REMOVED-OK  -- then use Config > System Update > Check for Updates to install 2.1.1.

1.note: Debug images available - contact for download links

2.note: Fresh-install SD-card images for 2.x. Pi Zero W is not supported — use Pi Zero 2 W. These replace the earlier 2.0.60 images, which shipped a leftover file that could stop updates from installing on first update.
